title: Deterministic Single Cell Encapsulation in Asymmetric Microenvironments to Direct Cell Polarity.
author: Cho IS Gupta P Mostafazadeh N Wong SW Saichellappa S Lenzini S Peng Z Shin JW
content: S-EPMC9875620 PMC9875620 Deterministic Single Cell Encapsulation in Asymmetric Microenvironments to Direct Cell Polarity. Various signals in tissue microenvironments are often unevenly distributed around cells. Cellular responses to asymmetric cell-matrix adhesion in a 3D space remain generally
